_meta.description: Bibliography of all sources used in the Iran Freedom project data

imf_weo_2024.name: IMF World Economic Outlook Database 2024
imf_weo_2024.description: IMF's semi-annual economic database covering 190+ countries

world_bank_api_2024.name: World Bank Open Data
world_bank_api_2024.description: World Bank's open data portal with historical economic indicators

world_bank_historical.name: World Bank Historical Data (Penn World Tables via WB)
world_bank_historical.description: Historical GDP data; pre-1980 Iran data carries uncertainty

columbia_sipa_sanctions_study.name: Columbia SIPA Sanctions and the Iranian Economy
columbia_sipa_sanctions_study.description: Academic analysis of economic impact of sanctions on Iran

rand_iran_military.name: RAND Corporation — Iran's Military
rand_iran_military.description: RAND's research on Iranian military capabilities and spending

atlantic_council_iran.name: Atlantic Council IranSource
atlantic_council_iran.description: Policy-oriented analysis of Iran; some political bias, note accordingly

fdd_report_irgc.name: Foundation for Defense of Democracies — IRGC Reports
fdd_report_irgc.bias_note: FDD leans hawkish on Iran; cross-reference with other sources
fdd_report_irgc.description: Detailed IRGC economic and military analysis

ihr_iran.name: Iran Human Rights (IHR)
ihr_iran.description: Iran-focused human rights monitoring organization based in Oslo

rsf_press_freedom_index_2024.name: Reporters Without Borders — Press Freedom Index 2024

freedom_house_net_freedom_2024.name: Freedom House — Freedom on the Net 2024

wef_global_gender_gap_2024.name: World Economic Forum — Global Gender Gap Report 2024
wef_global_gender_gap_2024.description: Annual gender gap index covering 146 countries

sipri.name: SIPRI Military Expenditure Database
sipri.description: Stockholm International Peace Research Institute military spending data

brown_university_costs_of_war.name: Brown University Costs of War Project
brown_university_costs_of_war.description: Comprehensive accounting of war costs — human and financial

netblocks_report_2019.name: NetBlocks — Iran Internet Shutdown Report Nov 2019
netblocks_report_2019.description: Internet shutdown monitoring and economic cost analysis

bonbast_com.name: Bonbast.com — Iran Open Market Exchange Rates
bonbast_com.description: Unofficial but widely-used source for Iran's open market exchange rates. CBI official rate is lower and not market-reflective.
bonbast_com.note: Always disclaim this is open/unofficial market rate, not official CBI rate

eia_iran_data.name: US Energy Information Administration — Iran
eia_iran_data.description: Iran energy sector data and analysis

un_panel_experts_yemen.name: UN Panel of Experts on Yemen
un_panel_experts_yemen.description: UN reports documenting Iranian support for Houthis

imf_brain_drain_report_2006.name: IMF — Brain Drain: Emigration and Returns (2006)
imf_brain_drain_report_2006.description: IMF study naming Iran as #1 in brain drain globally
